nasb.text: Now in that day Tyre will be forgotten for seventy years like the days of one king. At the end of seventy years it will happen to Tyre as in the song of the harlot:

esv.text: In that day Tyre will be forgotten for seventy years, like the days of one king. At the end of seventy years, it will happen to Tyre as in the song of the prostitute:

cnv.text: 到那日，推羅必被忘記七十年，正如一個王朝的年日；七十年後，推羅必像妓女所唱之歌：

ccb.text: 到那日，泰尔必被遗忘七十年，正好一个王的寿数。七十年之后，泰尔必如歌中所描述的妓女：

csbs.text: 那时起，提尔将被遗忘七十年，如同一个王的年数；到了七十年结束的时候，所临到提尔的事会像妓女歌中所唱的：
